parameters.Description_ZH: DC1 通用配送循環 - 人工與機械搬運跌落測試 (保障等級 I - 高強度)
parameters.Description_EN: DC1 General Distribution - Manual/Mechanical handling drop test (Assurance Level I - High Intensity)
parameters.Assurance Level: I (High intensity / Low probability of occurrence)
parameters.Test Method: ASTM D5276 Free-fall drop / ASTM D4003 Shock machine

parameters.Description_ZH: DC1 通用配送循環 - 人工與機械搬運跌落測試 (保障等級 II - 中強度)
parameters.Description_EN: DC1 General Distribution - Drop test Assurance Level II (Medium Intensity)

parameters.Description_ZH: DC1 - 倉儲堆疊壓縮測試 (模擬倉庫長期堆疊荷重)
parameters.Description_EN: DC1 - Warehouse stacking compression test (long-term storage load simulation)
parameters.Test Method: ASTM D642 or ASTM D4169 Section 13
parameters.Formula Notes: H=stack height, h=unit height, W=unit weight, SF=safety factor 1.5~2.0
parameters.Test Duration: 1 hour (static) or constant speed to failure (dynamic)

tests.Condition: Apply calculated load uniformly on top surface
Maintain 1 hour at full load — no collapse allowed
Inspect deformation; functional test of contents

parameters.Description_ZH: DC1 - 車輛運輸中的堆疊壓縮 (含濕度、溫度、振動影響)
parameters.Description_EN: DC1 - Stacking compression during vehicle transport with environmental effects

tests.Condition: Apply top load per Formula, include environmental conditions
Apply ASTM D999 vibration while under compression
Check for bulging, delamination, content damage

parameters.Description_ZH: DC1 - 堆疊狀態下的垂直振動測試 (模擬滿載卡車路面振動)
parameters.Description_EN: DC1 - Vertical vibration while stacked — simulates loaded truck on road
parameters.Test Method: ASTM D999 Method A1 (resonance search) or B (fixed frequency)

tests.Action: Identify resonant frequency of test unit

tests.Condition: Vibrate at resonant freq while under top load
Check for container failure or content damage

parameters.Description_ZH: DC1 - 整車 (TL) 隨機振動測試 (模擬卡車路面振動 PSD 頻譜)
parameters.Description_EN: DC1 - Truckload random vibration PSD profile (road transport simulation)
parameters.Axes: Vertical required; Lateral and Longitudinal optional

parameters.Description_ZH: DC3 型 LTL 零擔貨運隨機振動 (更嚴苛於整車)
parameters.Description_EN: LTL Motor Freight - More severe PSD profile than truckload
parameters.Note: LTL involves multiple truck transfers — higher cumulative damage

parameters.Description_ZH: DC1 航空貨運振動 (D4169-22 更新: 6個頻率點，含高中低密度三種等級)
parameters.Description_EN: Air cargo vibration — D4169-22 updated to 6 frequencies, 3 density levels (no Assurance Level choice needed)
parameters.Key Change vs -09: Changed from 4 to 6 discrete frequencies (1, 2, 42, 50, 120, 200 Hz); cycles through ALL 3 density levels
parameters.Density Levels: High, Medium, Low — all three levels tested
parameters.Duration: 40 min total per axis (cycling through all 3 levels)

tests.Note: Cycle through all 3 levels; overall Grms LOWER than previous D4169 versions

parameters.Description_ZH: 航空貨運低氣壓測試 (模擬非加壓貨艙高空低氣壓環境)
parameters.Description_EN: Air freight low-pressure simulation for non-pressurized cargo holds

tests.Action: Maintain 57.2 kPa; monitor for gas/liquid leakage
Return to ambient; perform functional test

parameters.Description_ZH: DC3 - 針對單一包裝零擔貨運的跌落測試 (非棧板)
parameters.Description_EN: DC3 - Individual package drop for LTL freight (no pallet/skid)
parameters.Assurance Level: I or II depending on risk
parameters.Note: DC3 is for single packages without pallet — LTL motor freight

parameters.Description_ZH: DC3 LTL 零擔貨運隨機振動 (需經多次裝卸轉運，振動累積嚴苛)
parameters.Description_EN: DC3 LTL random vibration — multiple truck transfers, more cumulative damage

tests.Note: Much more aggressive than TL profile

parameters.Description_ZH: DC6 - 鐵路綁固貨物的調車場車廂連結衝擊測試
parameters.Description_EN: DC6 - Rail tied-down load, railcar humping/coupling impact
parameters.Test Setup: Secure test load on flatcar or simulate coupling

tests.Condition: Inspect for load shift, container breach, content damage

parameters.Description_ZH: DC6 - 鐵路運輸振動測試
parameters.Description_EN: DC6 - Rail transport vibration — vertical and lateral profiles
parameters.Duration: Per ASTM D4169-22 Table (function of journey distance)

parameters.Description_ZH: DC13 - 國內航空貨運搬運跌落測試
parameters.Description_EN: DC13 - Domestic air freight handling drop test
parameters.Note: Air freight handling tends to be rougher than truck — drop heights same as DC1

parameters.Description_ZH: DC13 - 國內航空貨運振動測試 (D4169-22 更新 6個頻率點)
parameters.Description_EN: DC13 - Domestic air cargo vibration — 6-frequency updated profile
parameters.Key Change: D4169-22 removes user choice of Assurance Level for air vibration — all levels tested

parameters.Description_ZH: DC13 - 國內航空貨運低氣壓 (4,572m 模擬非加壓貨艙)
parameters.Description_EN: DC13 - 15,000 ft altitude simulation for non-pressurized domestic air cargo
